items.definition_en: A hammer is a tool used for hitting nails.
items.example_en: He used a hammer to fix the chair.

items.definition_en: A screwdriver is a tool for turning screws.
items.example_en: She picked up the screwdriver to tighten the screws.

items.definition_en: Pliers are a tool for gripping or bending things.
items.example_en: He used pliers to pull out the nail.

items.definition_en: A drill is a tool for making holes.
items.example_en: She used a drill to put up the shelf.

items.definition_en: A tape measure is a tool used to measure length.
items.example_en: He used a tape measure to check the window size.

items.definition_en: A wrench is a tool for turning nuts and bolts.
items.example_en: She grabbed a wrench to fix the pipe.

items.definition_en: A saw is a tool used for cutting wood.
items.example_en: He used a saw to cut the old wood.

items.definition_en: A paintbrush is a tool for putting paint on things.
items.example_en: She used a paintbrush to paint the wall.

items.definition_en: A glue gun is a tool for joining things with hot glue.
items.example_en: I used a glue gun to fix the broken toy.

items.definition_en: A ladder is a tool used to reach high places.
items.example_en: He climbed the ladder to change the light bulb.

items.definition_en: A toolbox is a box for keeping tools.
items.example_en: All the tools are in the toolbox.

items.definition_en: Sandpaper is a tool for making things smooth.
items.example_en: She used sandpaper to smooth the wood surface.

items.definition_en: A wrench is a tool for turning nuts and bolts.
items.example_en: He needed a wrench to fix the bike.
